name: @builderforce/resource-gap-engine
description: Core engine for resource gap analysis with hiring, deployment, and upskill recommendations. Implements FR-1 through FR-6 and AC-2, AC-3, AC-4, AC-5, AC-9. RBAC/persistence/API/locality wake/wan/wai/saat are reserved for follow-up tasks (#uf20-#uf23).
